# Channel Delivery State Machine

This document contains the generated state diagram for the shared channel delivery core.

The source of truth is `src/shared/channel-delivery.ts`; regenerate this file with `pnpm exec tsx scripts/render-channel-delivery-diagram.ts` after changing states or transitions.

<!-- Generated by scripts/render-channel-delivery-diagram.ts -->
<!-- Source: src/shared/channel-delivery.ts -->
```mermaid
stateDiagram-v2
    [*] --> received: webhook-received
    received --> validated: validated
    received --> rejected: validation-rejected
    validated --> dedup-checked: dedup-checked
    validated --> duplicate: duplicate-detected
    dedup-checked --> fast-path-eligible: fast-path-eligible
    fast-path-eligible --> fast-path-forwarding: fast-path-started
    fast-path-forwarding --> visibility-unknown: fast-path-accepted
    fast-path-forwarding --> accepted-noop: fast-path-accepted-noop
    fast-path-forwarding --> workflow-planned: fast-path-fallback
    dedup-checked --> workflow-planned: workflow-planned
    workflow-planned --> workflow-start-failed: workflow-start-failed
    workflow-planned --> wake-running: wake-started
    wake-running --> native-forwarding: native-forward-started
    native-forwarding --> visibility-unknown: native-forward-accepted
    native-forwarding --> native-forward-failed: native-forward-failed
    native-forward-failed --> terminal-failed: terminal-failed
    visibility-unknown --> reply-observation-pending: reply-observation-started
    reply-observation-pending --> reply-observed: reply-observed
    reply-observation-pending --> visibility-unknown: reply-observation-timeout
    visibility-unknown --> reply-observed: reply-observed
```

## Terms

Delivery states: `received`, `validated`, `dedup-checked`, `fast-path-eligible`, `fast-path-forwarding`, `workflow-planned`, `wake-running`, `native-forwarding`, `native-forward-failed`, `reply-observation-pending`, `rejected`, `duplicate`, `accepted-noop`, `native-accepted`, `visibility-unknown`, `reply-observed`, `terminal-failed`, `workflow-start-failed`.

Notice states: `not-needed`, `unavailable`, `send-pending`, `sent`, `update-pending`, `cleared`, `failed`.

Delivery events: `webhook-received`, `validated`, `validation-rejected`, `dedup-checked`, `duplicate-detected`, `fast-path-eligible`, `fast-path-started`, `fast-path-accepted`, `fast-path-accepted-noop`, `fast-path-fallback`, `workflow-planned`, `workflow-start-failed`, `wake-started`, `native-forward-started`, `native-forward-accepted`, `native-forward-failed`, `reply-observation-started`, `reply-observed`, `reply-observation-timeout`, `visibility-unknown`, `terminal-failed`.
